## WebGazer.js

- Source: https://github.com/brownhci/WebGazer
- Version/tag: `3.4.0`
- License: GNU General Public License v3.0 (GPL-3.0)
- License text: `vendor/WEBGAZER_LICENSE.md`
- Runtime source (CDN): `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/brownhci/WebGazer@3.4.0/www/webgazer.js`

Notes:
- WebGazer uses the webcam and typically requires HTTPS (or localhost) for permission prompts.
- GPL-3.0 has distribution implications. If you ship interpreter bundles that include
	or depend on WebGazer, review your compliance obligations.
- CogFlow does not relicense WebGazer and does not grant separate rights to WebGazer.
